nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 森林
nodes.summary: 森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联402种鸟类，包括疣鼻棲鴨、Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan等402种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Icterine greenbul
nodes.summary: Icterine greenbul（Icterine greenbul，学名 Phyllastrephus icterinus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于熱帶和亞熱帶濕潤闊葉林、森林，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。
locations: 熱帶和亞熱帶濕潤闊葉林

nodes.id: loc-熱帶和亞熱帶濕潤闊葉林-90e2a768
nodes.name: 熱帶和亞熱帶濕潤闊葉林
nodes.summary: 熱帶和亞熱帶濕潤闊葉林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联91种鸟类，包括伯氏穴䳍、巴西穴䳍、銹紅林鷓鴣等91种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.target: loc-熱帶和亞熱帶濕潤闊葉林-90e2a768
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is native to the African tropical rainforest

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The icterine greenbul is found in Africa from Guinea to Ghana; southern Nigeria to western and southern Uganda, eastern and central Democratic Republic of the Congo and extreme north-western Angola. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forests, subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests, and moist savanna

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The icterine greenbul is found in Africa from Guinea to Ghana; southern Nigeria to western and southern Uganda, eastern and central Democratic Republic of the Congo and extreme north-western Angola. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forests, subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests, and moist savanna
